headline: What Does DRAM Memory Spending Trend Mean for Lam Research (LRCX)
summary: Lam Research (NASDAQ:LRCX) is one of the 15 AI stocks that are quietly making investors rich. On February 25, Morgan Stanley increased the firm’s price target on Lam Research (NASDAQ:LRCX) to $254 from $244. The firm maintained an Equal Weight rating on the shares, which currently yield an adjusted upside potential of more than 16%. […]

headline: Is Lam Research Corporation (LRCX) A Good Stock To Buy Now?
summary: Is LRCX a good stock to buy? We came across a bullish thesis on Lam Research Corporation on Nikhs’s Substack. In this article, we will summarize the bulls’ thesis on LRCX. Lam Research Corporation’s share was trading at $199.33 as of March 6th. LRCX’s trailing and forward P/E were 40.93 and 29.41, respectively according to Yahoo Finance. Lam […]
